title: FsMkdir
description: fs.mkdir — create a directory. When recursive=false (default), the parent directory must already exist. When recursive=true, any missing parent directories are created (like mkdir -p).

path.description: Workspace-relative directory path to create. Daemon rejects absolute paths and escapes of the workspace root.

recursive.description: If true, create parent directories as needed (mkdir -p semantics).

path.description: The created directory path (echo of request, normalized).
